html:
Exclusive to:  

Dreadstone is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. Dreadstone is primarily obtained by destroying the Cracked Pillars that bind the Nightmare Werepig. After mining away the outer Marble layer, the pillars are indestructible and can only be destroyed by the Nightmare Werepig's slam attack, which it only uses after losing enough HP. The Dreadstone can also be mined from Dreadstone Outcrop.

With the Shadow Courtier skill, Wilson can transmute 3 Pure Horrors into 1 Dreadstone, as well as transmute 1 Dreadstone back into 2 Pure Horrors.

Along with Pure Horror, Dreadstone is used to craft Dreadstone Helm, Dreadstone Armor and Dreadstone Wall. 5 Dreadstones can be offered to the Beckoning Hand after defeating the Ancient Fuelweaver to summon Charlie and permanently activate the Shadow Rift.

Gallery

  • Beta Dreadstone Icon
  • Beta Dreadstone

–Walter
“As off-putting as it is, it could be useful.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dreadstone là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Dreadstone chủ yếu có được bằng cách phá hủy các Trụ cột bị nứt trói buộc Người sói ác mộng. Sau khi khai thác lớp Cẩm thạch bên ngoài, các cây cột không thể bị phá hủy và chỉ có thể bị phá hủy bởi đòn tấn công bằng cú đánh của Lợn sói ác mộng, đòn tấn công mà nó chỉ sử dụng sau khi mất đủ HP. Dreadstone cũng có thể được khai thác từ Dreadstone Outcrop.

'''Dreadstone''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. Dreadstone is primarily obtained by destroying the [[Cracked Pillar]]s that bind the [[Nightmare Werepig]]. After mining away the outer [[Marble]] layer, the pillars are indestructible and can only be destroyed by the Nightmare Werepig's slam attack, which it only uses after losing enough HP. The Dreadstone can also be mined from [[Dreadstone Outcrop]].

With the [[Shadow Courtier]] skill, [[Wilson]] can transmute 3 Pure Horrors into 1 Dreadstone, as well as transmute 1 Dreadstone back into 2 Pure Horrors.

Along with [[Pure Horror]], Dreadstone is used to craft [[Dreadstone Helm]], [[Dreadstone Armor]] and [[Dreadstone Wall]]. 5 Dreadstones can be offered to the [[Beckoning Hand]] after defeating the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]] to summon [[Charlie]] and permanently activate the [[Shadow Rift]].
